title: M1-01c: Add Send button disabled/loading states
acceptance_criteria: Send button is disabled when terminal input is empty
Send button shows loading state while message is being sent
Loading state uses spinner or similar indicator
Button re-enables after message is sent
deliverables: Updated MobileTerminalBar with state management for Send button
completed_summary: Implemented in InputBar.tsx with disabled and loading states (lines 61-75)
